_comment: Held-out contract fixture for trp-proof-generate. The distinctive dest_dir marker below (`discovery/proof/holdout-42-c7f1a9e/`) and the terminal modality selection appear NOWHERE in tests/fixtures/workflows/trp-proof-generate/ and would not be produced by any recorded replay.
